title: Boyorc Cherry Blossom Treehouse Micro Mini Building Block Sets, Chinese Bonsai Tree House Architecture Model Toy Gifts for Adults and Children（2500+ Pieces）
features: Clear theme and dreamy colors:The building blocks of the Fairy Pavilion are mainly colored in purple and blue, creating a mysterious world like a dream. The upper purple courtyard and cherry blossom trees complement each other, while the lower level is supported by multiple waterfalls, with lush greenery and blooming cherry blossoms in between. The blue base resembles a tranquil lake surface, making the entire building block feel like it is in a fairyland.

Lighting group, vivid and realistic:The building blocks of the Fairy Pavilion are embedded with lighting groups. When the lights light up, they penetrate the waterfall and courtyard, making the entire building block seem to be illuminated, making it more vivid and realistic. This design not only adds fun to play, but also allows the Fairy Pavilion to emit charming light at night.

Complex structure, with challenges and a sense of achievement coexisting:The building blocks of the Fairy Pavilion are a challenging set of building block toys. It adopts a two-layer structure design and requires players to patiently and meticulously build it. Collaborating with family not only enhances parent-child relationships, but also allows people to feel a sense of challenge and achievement during the construction process.

Exquisite gift box packaging, great gift item: The building blocks of the Fairy Pavilion are packaged in exquisite gift boxes, making them a unique gift for both friends and family. On holidays or special days, giving a piece of Fairy Pavilion building blocks can not only express feelings but also bring joy to the other party.

Combining education with entertainment to cultivate multiple abilities:By building the building blocks of the Fairy Pavilion, children can not only exercise their hands-on ability and spatial imagination, but also learn patience, attention to detail, and teamwork spirit through play. This building block is not only a toy, but also an educational tool that can accompany children's growth
